title: AutoCompressor
description: Automatically compress items based on custom recipes.
body:
## Features:
- Creating custom autocompressor recipes linked to an activator item
- All players can enable and disable AutoCompressors that they have unlocked for themself
- Admins can give activator items and revoke autocompresors from players
- **Easy setup with no writing in files required!**
##
### Commands:
- **/auc** (or /auc help) - Show all commands
- **/auc create <autocompressor id>** - Create an autocompressor hold the item in your hand that you want to use as the activator item and set the custom autocompressor id for the autocompressor
- **/auc createrecipe <recipe id> [input item amount] [output item amount]** - Create a recipe that can be added to a autocompressor later hold the input item in your main hand and the output item in your offhand the input item amount is how many input items it takes to get the resulting output item amount (defaults to 64 -> 1)
- **/auc asignrecipe <autocompressor id> <recipe id>** - Asign a created recipe to an autocompressor
- **/auc activator <autocompressor id> <player>** - Give yourself or another player an activator item
- **/auc type <AutoCompressor Id> <Permenant/Inventory/Offhand>** - Choose the type of AutoCompressor an AutoCompressor is, **Permenant** (default) - Right click activator item to claim it permenatly player's can toggle it on and off with the /toggle command, **Inventory** - Works only when the activator item is in the players inventory cannot claim the activator item, **Offhand** - Works the same way as the inventory type except the activator item only works when its in the players inventory
- **/auc list** - Lists all the autocompressor id's that you have add to the server
- **/auc listrecipes <autocompressor id>** - Lists all the recipes for a specific autocompressor
- **/auc remove <autocompressor id>** - Delete a specific autocompressor
- **/auc removerecipe <autocompressor id> <recipe id>** - Delete a specific recipe from an autocompressor using the recipe id
- **/auc deleterecipe <recipe id>** - Compltely delte a recipe id and remove it from all autocompressors
- **/auc revoke <autocompressor id> <player>** - Revoke an autocompressor from a player that has already unlocked an autocompressor
- **/auc toggle <autocompressor id> <player>** - Enable or disable an autocompressor that you have already unlocked admins can enable and disable other players unlocked autocompressors

- **/auc listtoggled** - List the autocompressors that you have unlocked and enabled or disabled
##
### Permissions:
- **autocompressor.*** - Get all permissions for the AutoCompressor plugin
- **autocompressor.create** - /auc create command
- **autocompressor.createrecipe** - /auc createrecipe command
- **autocompressor.removerecipe** - /auc removerecipe command
- **autocompressor.remove** - /auc remove command
- **autocompressor.activator** - /auc activator command
- **autocompressor.setactivator** - /auc setactivator command
- **autocompressor.listrecipes** - /auc listrecipes command
- **autocompressor.list** - /auc list command
- **autocompressor.revoke** - /auc revoke command
- **autocompressor.type** - /auc type command
- **autocompressor.deleterecipe** - /auc deleterecipe command
- **autocompressor.toggle** - /auc toggle command (enabled to all by default)
- **autocompressor.listtoggled** - /auc listtoggled command (enabled to all by default)
- **autocompressor.adminhelp** - See the admin help menu when you get sent the help menu
- **autocompressor.help** - /auc help command (enabled to all by default)
##
